name: Fujian Supertech Advanced Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Supertech Advanced Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of vacuum insulation panels in China. Its vacuum insulation panels are used in refrigerators, freezers, refrigerated trucks and containers, water heaters, vending machines, ice storage tanks, and energy saving insulating materials. It also provides clod chain insulated boxes. Fujian Supertech Advanced Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Longyan, China.
